day4_after_start.name: Me
day4_after_start.text: *After school. This is Day 4. The 'five days' Seolhwa mentioned... tomorrow is the last day.*

day4_after_basement.name: Me
day4_after_basement.text: *Seolhwa's clue. 'The basement.' I found a stairway behind the school building.*

day4_after_basement_2.name: Me
day4_after_basement_2.text: *A rusted door. The padlock is broken. Someone has been here before.*

day4_after_basement_3.name: Me
day4_after_basement_3.text: *...The basement. Fluorescent lights flicker. A metallic smell.*

day4_after_basement_4.name: Me
day4_after_basement_4.text: *Multiple beds. Medical equipment. Cabinets full of chemicals. This is... a laboratory?*

day4_after_basement_5.name: Me
day4_after_basement_5.text: *Charts on the wall. 'Subject Response Records'. Names and numbers. Most marked with a red X.*

day4_after_basement_6.name: Me
day4_after_basement_6.text: *Documents in a desk drawer. 'Memory Manipulation Protocol'... 'Transfer Student Acquisition Procedures'... 'Board Approved: Project Nevergrad — Cognitive Restructuring Research for Complete Compliance'...*

day4_after_basement_7.name: Me
day4_after_basement_7.text: *...! A sound from the corner. Someone is here.*

day4_after_basement_9.name: Me
day4_after_basement_9.text: *Yuna is collapsed on the floor. Pale face. Needle marks on her arm.*

day4_after_basement_rescue.name: Me
day4_after_basement_rescue.text: *I helped Yuna up. She's heavy. But I can't leave her here.*

day4_after_basement_rescue_2.name: Choi Yuna
day4_after_basement_rescue_2.text: "Senpai... thank you... we have to... get out..."

day4_after_basement_hide_2.name: Me
day4_after_basement_hide_2.text: *Someone checked the basement and left. I left Yuna behind. ...I'm sorry, Yuna.*

day4_after_basement_escape.name: Me
day4_after_basement_escape.text: *I got out of the basement. My hands are shaking. This school... what is this school?*

day4_after_sea_route.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_route.text: "{name}~ Let's go together today too! Where should we go~"

day4_after_sea_2.name: Me
day4_after_sea_2.text: *I followed Sea. She walked into an empty classroom.*

day4_after_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_3.text: "{name}. I need to tell you something."

day4_after_sea_4.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_4.text: "I... don't like you being with other people. Being alone with Yuna. Being with Ms. Eunsu."

day4_after_sea_5.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_5.text: "So... just look at me. Only me. Okay?"

day4_after_sea_crack.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack.text: "...Sometimes I wonder. If I left this place... where would I even go?"

day4_after_sea_crack_2.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack_2.text: *For a moment, fear flickered across Sea's eyes. Real emotion. Is she... trapped in something too? But it vanished just as quickly.*

day4_after_sea_accept_2.name: Me
day4_after_sea_accept_2.text: *Sea hugged me. Her arms tightened around my back. ...This isn't a hug.*

day4_after_evidence.name: Me
day4_after_evidence.text: *I stayed in the classroom to organize the evidence I've gathered.*

day4_after_evidence_2.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_2.text: *Photos from the memory card, the transfer student list, 'Processing Completion Date'... The puzzle is coming together.*

day4_after_evidence_3.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_3.text: *I checked the photos on Yuna's camera. There's a photo of the basement entrance.*

day4_after_evidence_3_alt.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_3_alt.text: *The evidence isn't enough, but... I can see the outline of what's happening at this school.*

day4_after_evidence_4.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_4.text: *The transfer students didn't 'disappear' — they were 'processed'. Erase their memories, mold them into perfectly obedient students... A testing facility funded by the board. This entire school.*

day4_after_evidence_6.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_6.text: *Ms. Eunsu is standing at the classroom door. Her expression is dark.*

day4_after_evidence_run.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_run.text: *I shoved a desk to block the way and ran. Heels clicking behind me. But I made it out.*

day4_after_evidence_caught.name: Park Eunsu
day4_after_evidence_caught.text: "Where do you think you're going? ...Not without my permission."

day4_after_evidence_caught_2.name: Park Eunsu
day4_after_evidence_caught_2.text: "It's okay, {name}. I'll take care of everything. ...You just need to stay here."

day4_after_end.name: Me
day4_after_end.text: *The sun sets. Tomorrow is the last day. I have to... get out of here.*
